scripts.postinstall: cd backend && npm install --include=dev && npx prisma generate && cd ../frontend && npm install --include=dev
scripts.build: cd frontend && npm run build && cd ../backend && npm run build
scripts.start: cd backend && (npx prisma db push --accept-data-loss --skip-generate || echo 'db push warning') && (node dist/db/seed.js || echo 'seed skipped') && node dist/index.js
